#JathiRatnalu #JathiRatnaluTrailer #NaveenPolishetty
 
Starring Naveen Polishetty, Priyadarshi, Rahul Ramakrishna, Faria Abdullah, Brahmaji, Brahmanandam, Vennela Kishore.




Story, Screenplay, Dialogues, Direction: Anudeep K V

snippet.title: Jetha की Life में फिर आया Bhogilal -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3115-4th Mar, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-is-sundar-s-client-1000110161?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3115: Bhogilal Enters Jethalal's Life Once Again
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder plays the call recording of the land deal to everyone present in the Gada household. While hearing this, Jethalal, Taarak, Sodhi and Bhide find out that the voice of the buyer is somewhat familiar. After investigating a little, they find out that it is indeed Bhogilal who has come into Jethalal's life once again, albeit as a buyer. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Paatashaala -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar|Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash|Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Song Details:
Song Name : Paatashaala
Singer : Vijay Prakash
Lyricist : Santhosh Ananddram
Music Director : Thaman S

Listen to "Yuvarathnaa (Kannada) - Paatashaala" Single on JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/3bcCpYK

snippet.title: DIVINE - Satya | Prod. by Karan Kanchan | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

“Satya” is from DIVINE’s sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90’s-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc. 

#DIVINE #PunyaPaap #Satya

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with 
Lotte Cultureworks, Global Gate Entertainment

snippet.title: E Bull Jet നെ ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta !!
snippet.description:
E Bull Jet ന്റെ വണ്ടിയിൽ പത്തനംതിട്ടയിൽ ഒരു വാൻ ലൈഫ്, എബിനെയും ലിബിനെയും ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta #techtraveleat 

Goosebery യുടെ പ്രൊഡക്ടുകൾ വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് https://www.goosebery.com/​​​​​​​​ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കുക. ‘TECHTRAVELEAT’ എന്ന കൂപ്പൺ കോഡ് ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് 20% ഡിസ്‌കൗണ്ട് കൂടുതലായി ലഭിക്കും.

Table of Content
00:00 Intro
02:55 വീട്ടിൽ നിന്നും യാത്രയാകുന്നു
03:13 ആരാധകർക്കൊപ്പം
03:46 E Bull Jet ൻ്റെ നെപ്പോളിയനെ ഞാൻ നയിച്ചപ്പോൾ
08:45 സോഡ കുടിക്കാൻ വഴിയരികിൽ വണ്ടി നിർത്തിയപ്പോൾ 
09:11 ശബരിമല റൂട്ടിലേക്ക്
11:22 ഫുൾ ടാങ്ക് ഡീസലടിച്ച് പ്രതിഷേധം
15:03 പാട്ടും പാടി എബിനും ലിബിനും
23:09 നിലയ്ക്കൽ എത്തുന്നു
32:12 പമ്പ കെഎസ്ആർടിസി സ്റ്റാൻഡിൽ എത്തിയപ്പോൾ
34:07 പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ ഇപ്പോഴത്തെ അവസ്ഥ
36:18 പമ്പയിൽ നിന്നും തിരിച്ച് വീട്ടിലേക്ക്

ml.title: E Bull Jet നെ ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta !!
ml.description:
E Bull Jet ന്റെ വണ്ടിയിൽ പത്തനംതിട്ടയിൽ ഒരു വാൻ ലൈഫ്, എബിനെയും ലിബിനെയും ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta #techtraveleat 

Goosebery യുടെ പ്രൊഡക്ടുകൾ വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് https://www.goosebery.com/​​​​​​​​ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കുക. ‘TECHTRAVELEAT’ എന്ന കൂപ്പൺ കോഡ് ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് 20% ഡിസ്‌കൗണ്ട് കൂടുതലായി ലഭിക്കും.

Table of Content
00:00 Intro
02:55 വീട്ടിൽ നിന്നും യാത്രയാകുന്നു
03:13 ആരാധകർക്കൊപ്പം
03:46 E Bull Jet ൻ്റെ നെപ്പോളിയനെ ഞാൻ നയിച്ചപ്പോൾ
08:45 സോഡ കുടിക്കാൻ വഴിയരികിൽ വണ്ടി നിർത്തിയപ്പോൾ 
09:11 ശബരിമല റൂട്ടിലേക്ക്
11:22 ഫുൾ ടാങ്ക് ഡീസലടിച്ച് പ്രതിഷേധം
15:03 പാട്ടും പാടി എബിനും ലിബിനും

34:07 പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ ഇപ്പോഴത്തെ അവസ്ഥ
36:18 പമ്പയിൽ നിന്നും തിരിച്ച് വീട്ടിലേക്ക്

snippet.title: Koi Hor - Dilnoor Ft. Afsana & B Praak | Sara Gurpal | Gurnazar | Shabby - New Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Pellet Drum Productions Presents "Koi Hor" which tells the story of a girl who is expecting her lover to come and confess his wrongdoings before it’s conveyed by a third person and before it's too late. “It’s a song that everybody can relate to. It talks about how we expect our loved ones to be honest with us.

snippet.title: Kamal Sir has Watched my Video - Blacksheep Award Function 🔥 - Emotional Day - Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#Kamal #BlackSheepAward #Irfansview 

A very big day for me, getting recognition for what we do gives us the real happiness. I would like to thank Black sheep for creating such a wonderful moment and Irfan's View family for supporting from the beginning. I will never every forget this day as I got a chance to stand near Ulaga Nayagan Kamal Haasan. He recognized me after seeing me and said he watches my videos. What more will I ask when he gave me the feel of real victory. I was in the Seventh heaven and I went speechless.
_______________________________

snippet.title: Dooriyan (Official Video) Raghav Chaitanya | Shivin Narang, Apoorva Arora | Anurag Saikia | Kunaal V
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Dooriyan sung by the youth sensation Raghav Chaitanya and the music video stars Shivin Narang and Apoorva Arora. This song has been finely composed by Anurag Saikia & written by Kunaal Vermaa. The video has been directed by Karan Anshuman who narrates a gripping story, where Shivin and Apoorva portray an estranged couple who later realise the true value of love. The story unfolds intense situations and memories of their past. 

People say you don’t know what you’ve got until it's gone. But the truth is, you knew what you had, you just never thought you’d lose it… watch till the end to see how Shivins desperate search ends.

#Shivin #Apoorva #VYRLOriginals

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/dooriyan/ML8KgFeVJQs_

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

localized.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
localized.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Dausa: प्रेमी के साथ रह रही बेटी को पिता ने उतारा मौत के घाट | News18 Rajasthan
snippet.description:
जिले में ऑनर किलिंग (Honor Killing) का बड़ा मामला सामने आया है. यहां अपने प्रेमी के साथ लिव इन रिलेशन (Live-in relationship) में रह रही एक लड़की को उसके पिता ने ही मौत के घाट (Murder) उतार दिया. बाद में पुलिस थाने जाकर खुद को सरेंडर कर दिया. ताजुब्ब की बात यह है कि लड़की ने इस मामले को लेकर हाई कोर्ट की शरण ली थी. हाई कोर्ट ने भी पुलिस-प्रशासन को निर्देश दिये थे कि उसे सुरक्षा उपलब्ध करवायी जाये. लेकिन ऐसा हुआ नहीं और लड़की को प्यार करने की सजा अपनी मौत से चुकानी पड़ी.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Kevin O’Brien's record century against England in famous World Cup win | #CWC11Rewind
snippet.description:
Ireland produced one of the biggest shocks in world cup history as they overcame England in Bengaluru. 

After being set an imposing target of 328 by England, as Jonathan Trott (92) narrowly missed out on a World Cup century & right-arm seamer John Mooney returned excellent figures of 4/63. 

Ireland’s run chase got off to the worst possible start as they lost captain William Porterfield to the first ball of the innings. And it wouldn’t be until the loss of Ireland’s 5th wicket that their run-chase started to pick up serious momentum. As the pair of Kevin O’Brien and Alex Cusack put on a remarkable 162 runs for the 6th wicket partnership, a World Cup record stand.

That wouldn’t be the only record to be broken as Kevin O’Brien’s herculean 100 off just 50 balls became the fastest World Cup century in the tournament's history. Guiding Ireland to the brink of victory O’Brien finally fell, leaving the winning moment to John Mooney as his boundary sealed victory for Ireland and sparked scenes of jubilation. 

A true World Cup classic and quite possibly the biggest shock in the tournament's history. A famous Irish victory ☘️

Join us to celebrate 10 years since the iconic 2011 Men’s Cricket World Cup. A festival of cricket featuring some of the biggest sixes, greatest wickets, and a countless number of moments that inspired a generation.

Follow #CWC11Rewind across all our digital and social platforms up until 2nd April.

On our Website: https://www.icc-cricket.com/
On Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/icc 
On Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/icc/
On Twitter: https://twitter.com/ICC

snippet.title: आखिर क्या है Jethalal की ज़िद?  -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah -तारक मेहता- Ep 3114-3rd March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-s-dilemma-1000109810?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3114: Can Jethalal Save His Ancestor's Land?
---------------------------------------------------------
Everyone is all set to go for the Land deal but Jethalal is still against selling his ancestor's land. Jethalal asks Champaklal to not sell the land but Champaklal says this is to only option left so to save his ancestor's land Jethalal ran away with land paper. Iyer asks Jethalal if he will not sell the land how will he deliver the 100 Tabs. Can Jethalal Save His Ancestor's Land? Who will Jethalal Deliver the 100 Tabs?. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 139 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
After Mayura gives birth to the child, Omkar disowns her under the pretext that she will be a bad influence on the newborn. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZzKESURdZe82ZWGXEwIrl-

snippet.title: ಯಾರಿವಳು ಯಾರಿವಳು? ಇದು ಲಾಕ್‌ಡೌನ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ಚಿತ್ರೀಕರಿಸಿದ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಗುಟ್ಟು! Ramesh Jarkiholi's scandal secret!
snippet.description:
TV9 Special: Ramesh Jarkiholi's sex scandal secret exposed! Who are all the enemies of Ramesh Jarkiholi?

ಅರ್ಧ ತಾಸಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಎರಡು ಸಮಾಚಾರದ ಸರಳ ವಿಸ್ತೃತ ವಿವರ!

ಮಲ್ಲೇಶ್ವರಂನಲ್ಲಿ ಶೂಟಿಂಗ್‌.. ಮಾಸ್ಕೋದಲ್ಲಿ ರಿಲೀಸ್‌!
ಉತ್ತರ ಕರ್ನಾಟಕದ ನೊಂದ ಯುವತಿ ಹಾರಿದ್ದೆಲ್ಲಿಗೆ?
ಇದು ಲಾಕ್‌ಡೌನ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ಚಿತ್ರೀಕರಿಸಿದ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಗುಟ್ಟು 
ಒಂಟಿತೋಳದ ನಾಗಾಲೋಟಕ್ಕೆ ಬಿತ್ತು ಕಡಿವಾಣ.. ಮುಂದೇನು?   
ಸಾಹುಕಾರ ಮೈಮೇಲೆ ಎಳ್ಕೊಂಡ ವಿವಾದಗಳೆಷ್ಟು.. ಶತ್ರುಗಳ್ಯಾರು?

snippet.title: Sudheer | Rashmi |Deepika |Aadi | Funny Joke | Dhee 13 | Kings vs Queens| 3rd March 2021 |ETV Telugu
snippet.description:
#Dhee13KingsvsQueens #Dhee13 #ETVTelugu #ETVWin #SudigaaliSudheer #Rashmi  #PradeepMachiraju #HyperAadi #SekharMaster  #DeepikaPilli #Poorna #Priyamani

Pradeep along with Sudheer, Aadhi, Rashmi, and Deepika set the stage into a burst of laughter with their satirical comments.

దక్షణ భారతదేశంలో అతిపెద్ద డాన్స్ రియాలిటీ షో "ఢీ".... 12 సీజన్స్ ముగించుకొని ఇప్పుడు  ఢీ కింగ్స్ v/s క్వీన్స్ ("ఢీ" 13వ సీజన్) గా మిమ్మల్ని అలరించడానికి వేరే లెవల్ ఎంటర్ టైన్ మెంట్ ని అందించడానికి సిద్దమైంది. కింగ్స్ టీమ్ కి సుడిగాలి సుధీర్ & హైపర్ ఆది, క్వీన్స్ టీమ్ కి రేష్మి & టిక్ టాక్ స్టార్ దీపికా... జడ్జెస్ గా శేఖర్ మాస్టర్ గారు హీరోయిన్ ప్రియమణి వ్యవహరిస్తారు.

snippet.title: Gokulathil Seethai & Yaaradi Nee Mohini Mahasangamam - Daily, 8-9 PM - Promo - Zee Tamil

snippet.title: 🔴-LIVE-മമ്പുറം സ്വലാത്ത് തത്സമയം 04 - 03 - 2021 I 07:05 pm
snippet.description:
MAMPURAM MAQAM SWALATH MAJLIS I 04 - 03-2021
#mampurammaqam#swalath#live


മമ്പുറം മഖാമിലേക്ക് സ്വാഗതം .ദക്ഷിണേന്ത്യയിലെ പ്രധാന തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രമാണ് മമ്പുറം മഖാം. മലപ്പുറം ജില്ലയിലെ തിരൂരങ്ങാടി താലൂക്കിൽ,  സ്ഥിതി ചെയ്യുന്ന മഖാം ശരീഫിൽ അന്ത്യവിശ്രമം കൊള്ളുന്നത് കേരളീയ മുസ്‌ലിം ചരിത്രത്തിലും അധിനിവേശ വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടങ്ങളിലും ശ്രദ്ധേയ സാന്നിധ്യമായിരുന്ന ഖുഥ്ബുസ്സമാൻ സയ്യിദ് അലവി ബിൻ മുഹമ്മദ് ബിൻ സഹ്ൽ മൗലദ്ദവീല തങ്ങളും കുടുംബാംഗങ്ങളുമാണ്. യമനിലെ ഹള്‌റമൗത്തിൽ നിന്ന് ഇസ്‌ലാമിക പ്രബോധനാവശ്യാർത്ഥം മലബാറിലെത്തുകയും പിന്നീട് ഇവിടത്തെ മത-സാമൂഹിക-രാഷ്ട്രീയ മേഖലകളിൽ ശക്തമായ ഇടപെടലുകൾ നടത്തുകയും ചെയ്ത അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ ആത്മീയ തണൽ തേടി ജീവിത കാലത്തെന്ന പോലെ ജാതി-മത ഭേദമന്യെ അനേകായിരം തീർത്ഥാടകർ ഇവിടെ ഇപ്പോഴും എത്തിച്ചേരുന്നു.മമ്പുറം മഖാമിൽ നടക്കുന്ന പ്രധാന ചടങ്ങുകളിലൊന്നാണ് വ്യാഴാഴ്ച സ്വലാത്ത്.  മമ്പുറം തങ്ങളുടെ അമ്മാവനും ഭാര്യാപിതാവുമായ സയ്യിദ് ഹസൻ ബിൻ അലവി ജിഫ്‌രി തങ്ങളുടെ വിയോഗാനന്തരം മമ്പുറം തങ്ങൾ സ്ഥാപിച്ചതാണ് ഈ സ്വലാത്ത് മജ്ലിസ്.  
നേര്‍ച്ചകള്‍ക്കും സംഭാവനകള്‍ക്കും ബന്ധപ്പെടുക :
 91 9656310300 (Help Line) , 
+91 9996 313 786 , 
0494 2460 575, 
0494 2464 502 (Darul Huda).

Google Pay സൌകര്യം ലഭ്യമാണ്:
Number: +91 9996 313 786







Event Broadcasting: shahulbavu thurakkal

snippet.description:
While flying kites with the kids, Purvi chases a kite to the old fort and finds a ring despite the place never having any visitors. Later, Purvi grows suspicious of Anjali and Bhuri's evil intentions. Will she be able to expose the truth?
#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KugwSJL_LP3-WDgtLMI4Z13

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

தீ விபத்தில் உருக்குலைந்த பெண்ணுடன் அவரின் வருங்கால கணவர் கேரளாவில் நடத்திய போட்டோ ஷூட் இணையத்தில் வேகமாக பரவி வருகிறது.

கேரள மாநிலம் இடுக்கி அருகே உள்ள குமுளி பகுதியை சேர்ந்தவர் சூசன் தாமஸ். 24 வயது வரை அழகிய தோற்றத்துடன் இருந்த இவரை தீ விபத்து மீளா துயரில் ஆழ்த்தியது. வீட்டில் இருந்த கேஸ் அடுப்பில் ஏற்பட்ட கசிவால் திடீரென பிடித்த தீயில் சிக்கிய சூசன், தன் தோற்றத்தை முற்றிலும் இழந்தார். அவரின் கை விரல்களும் உருக்குலைந்த நிலையில் தன் தோற்றத்தை பார்த்து மனம் நொந்தார். அக்கம்பக்கத்தினரும், சமூக வலைதளங்களும் சூசனின் தோற்றத்தை வைத்து கேலி, கிண்டல்களை முன்வைத்தன. ஆனால் அவரின் காதலனான டாக்டர் மனு கோபிநாத், சூசனே தன் உலகம் என்பதில் உறுதியாக இருந்தார். அதற்கேற்றார் போல, இவர்களுக்கு திருமண தேதியும் நிச்சயிக்கப்பட்ட நிலையில் திருமணத்திற்கு முந்தைய போட்டோ ஷூட் ஒன்றை இவர்கள் நடத்தினர். இந்த படங்கள் அனைத்தும் இணையத்தில் பகிரப்பட்டு வரும் நிலையில் அதற்கு பலரும் வரவேற்பு தெரிவித்துள்ளனர்.

snippet.title: King - Blanko | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
LYRICS:

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse 1

Maine Din bhi sudhaar liye,
Kapde bhi sawaar liye,
Abhi kitna kama rahe,
Tune chhote hi sawaal kiye.

Tera zikar chhupa liya,
Aur khudse malaal kiye,
Na soch sakoge tum
Humne itne kamaal kiye.

Afsos hota hai bas hume is baat ka,
Tum dil mein jaana kabhi nahi jhaanke.

Tum humse aisa pyaar kabhi kar na sake,
Jaisi ye duniya karti hain baatein.

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse2

Faslon mein,
Bhi raza teri.
Mushkilon mein,
Kyu wafa meri.

Main hasun na,
Khwahishein teri,
Tu roye na,
Ye dua meri.

Jo mujhse door jayegi,
To jaana toot jayegi,
Ye duniya hai khayalon ki,
Tu sach mein ruth jayegi.

Main tujhse kya chhupaunga,
Tu mujhko kya btayegi,
Tu jab bhi aankhein band karle,
Saamne mujhko payegi.

Pre-Chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya - 2.T

snippet.title: Bhogilal Ki Asliyat! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा - Ep 3115
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (🔔 ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. That’s because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it can’t easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didn’t have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didn’t prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

snippet.title: அரசியலிலிருந்து SASIKALA ஒதுங்கியதற்கான 3 காரணங்கள்... | Elangovan Explains
snippet.description:
#Sasikala 

With just a month to go for Assembly polls in Tamil Nadu, J Jayalalithaa’s close aide VK Sasikala, who was released from a Bengaluru prison on January 27, issued a statement Wednesday that she has decided to “step aside” from politics and that she will pray for Amma’s (Jayalalithaa’s) “golden rule”.

A two-page letter, signed by her, and released first on Jaya TV, appealed to Amma’s followers to work hard to ensure her rule. “As Amma used to say, defeating the evil force DMK should be the main aim of all obedient cadre of Amma’s party,” Sasikala wrote, thanking all who showered her with love.

While Sasikala’s surprise and the sudden decision are expected to help the ruling AIADMK and avoid splitting of votes, it comes as a jolt to her nephew TTV Dhinakaran, who was ousted from AIADMK along with her in 2017. After defeating the AIADMK and DMK candidates in the high-decibel RK Nagar — Jayalalithaa’s constituency — bypoll in December 2017, he launched his own party, Amma Makkal Munnetra Kazhagam (AMMK), in March 2018. The party garnered a vote share of more than 4 percent in the Lok Sabha polls in 2019.In this video Se.Tha Elangovan talks about the Reason for Sasikala quits Politics


CREDITS
Host -Se.Tha Elangovan  | Script - Ponkumaraguruparan , Se.Tha Elangovan | Camera -Hariharan  | Edit -Ajith



Vikatan App - http://bit.ly/2Sks6FG
Subscribe To Vikatan Tv : https://goo.gl/wVkvNp

snippet.title: Myanmar sees deadly clashes despite calls for calm - BBC News
snippet.description:
Anti-coup protesters in Myanmar have been killed after troops opened fire. 

The security forces used live rounds on large crowds in Mandalay and Monywa, and at least two of the victims are believed be teenage children.

Mass protests have been taking place across the country since the military seized control on 1 February.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

snippet.title: Hardik Patel કૉંગ્રેસની હાર બાદ શું બોલ્યાં અને આગળની કામગીરી વિશે શું કહ્‌યું?
snippet.description:
ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીમાં ભાજપનો ભવ્ય વિજય થયો છે. મુખ્ય વિપક્ષ કોંગ્રેસની આ ચૂંટણીમાં હાર થઈ છે. 

કૉંગ્રેસના મોટા નેતાઓના વિસ્તારમાં પણ તેમના ઉમેદવારો હારી ગયા છે.

જેથી ગુજરાત કૉંગ્રેસ પ્રમુખ અમિત ચાવડાએ રાજીનામું આપી દીધું છે. 

આ મુદ્દે કૉંગ્રેસના કાર્યકારી અધ્યક્ષ હાર્દિક પટેલે કૉંગ્રેસની હાર પર પોતાની પ્રતિક્રિયા આપી છે.
#hardikpatel #gujaratelection #gujaratcongress

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r

localized.title: Hardik Patel કૉંગ્રેસની હાર બાદ શું બોલ્યાં અને આગળની કામગીરી વિશે શું કહ્‌યું?
localized.description:
ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીમાં ભાજપનો ભવ્ય વિજય થયો છે. મુખ્ય વિપક્ષ કોંગ્રેસની આ ચૂંટણીમાં હાર થઈ છે. 

કૉંગ્રેસના મોટા નેતાઓના વિસ્તારમાં પણ તેમના ઉમેદવારો હારી ગયા છે.

જેથી ગુજરાત કૉંગ્રેસ પ્રમુખ અમિત ચાવડાએ રાજીનામું આપી દીધું છે. 

આ મુદ્દે કૉંગ્રેસના કાર્યકારી અધ્યક્ષ હાર્દિક પટેલે કૉંગ્રેસની હાર પર પોતાની પ્રતિક્રિયા આપી છે.
#hardikpatel #gujaratelection #gujaratcongress

snippet.title: The RelationShit | Anmol Sachar | Bhavika Motwani (Comedy Video)
snippet.description:
The RelationShit is a comedy video by Anmol Sachar ft Bhavika Motwani in which a boyfriend gets a video call from his annoying girlfriend who needs no reason to fight with him & picks a fight for every single thing he says. This leads to some super crazy situations & a funny conversation between the girlfriend & boyfriend who are surely experiencing pyaar ke side effects & realize that their relationship is more of a relationshit!

What happens in the end? Does the boyfriend get frustrated & speak up? Does he continue to remain silent and bear the torture because he loves his girl friend? Does the girl realize that she’s not treating him right Or is there an unexpected twist in this BF Vs GF tale?

Yeh sab pata karne ke liye video end takk zaroor dekhna! I promise you will love it!

--------------------------------------------------------------------
► Can we cross 40K LIKES on this video? Hit that LIKE button now! 

► Click the ‘Red Subscribe Button’ to become a part of my YouTube family!
You can also click this link: https://www.youtube.com/anmolsachar?sub_confirmation=1

► Which was your favourite part & dialogue? Comments mein batao!

► Don’t forget to share this video with your friends & family!

snippet.title: Behen Ok Please - Friendzone ft. Shreya Gupto & Sanaya Pithawalla | Girliyapa
snippet.description:
Swati is trying to convince Aarti about taking her friendship with a guy to the next level. Aarti wonders what's wrong in just being 'good friends'. Then begins the discussion on the most dangerous zone in the world-Friendzone. Let's find out who manages to convince whom?

#Girliyapa #BehenOkPlease 

Credits:
Channel Head: Anandeshwar Dwivedi
Creative Director:Anant Singh 'Bhatu'
Directed By: Viplove Soni
